chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 258 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on CMA 2810/2025 (u/A) 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on statement dated 30.04.2025 4. For hearing of CMA 1218/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case. 07.05.2025. Mr. Athar Hussain Abro Advocate by holding brief on behalf of Syed Zaffar Ali Shah counsel for petitioners under instructions does not wish to press this petition, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
